mapper.select: SELECT * FROM amz_fba_shipment ORDER BY sid, shipment_id, sku
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO amz_fba_shipment ( sid, username, shipment_id, shipment_name,shipment_status, msku, sku, quantity_shipped, init_quantity_shipped, quantity_received, quantity_shipped_local, declared_diff, gmt_create, gmt_modified, working_time, shipped_time, receiving_time, closed_time ) VALUES
( #{e.sid}, #{e.username}, #{e.shipmentId}, #{e.shipmentName}, #{e.shipmentStatus}, #{e.msku}, #{e.sku}, #{e.quantityShipped}, #{e.initQuantityShipped}, #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.quantityShippedLocal}, #{e.quantityShipped} - #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.gmtCreate}, #{e.gmtModified}, #{e.workingTime}, #{e.shippedTime}, #{e.receivingTime}, #{e.closedTime} )

INSERT INTO amz_fba_shipment ( sid, username, shipment_id, shipment_name,shipment_status, msku, sku, quantity_shipped, init_quantity_shipped, quantity_received, quantity_shipped_local, declared_diff, gmt_create, gmt_modified, working_time, shipped_time, receiving_time, closed_time, ship_to_name, ship_to_country_code, ship_to_state, ship_to_city, ship_to_region, ship_to_address_line1, ship_to_address_line2, ship_to_postal_code, ship_to_doorplate ) VALUES
( #{e.sid}, #{e.username}, #{e.shipmentId}, #{e.shipmentName}, #{e.shipmentStatus}, #{e.msku}, #{e.sku}, #{e.quantityShipped}, #{e.initQuantityShipped}, #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.quantityShippedLocal}, #{e.quantityShipped} - #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.gmtCreate}, #{e.gmtModified}, #{e.workingTime}, #{e.shippedTime}, #{e.receivingTime}, #{e.closedTime}, #{e.shipToName}, #{e.shipToCountryCode}, #{e.shipToState}, #{e.shipToCity}, #{e.shipToRegion}, #{e.shipToAddressLine1}, #{e.shipToAddressLine2}, #{e.shipToPostalCode}, #{e.shipToDoorplate} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE working_time = VALUES(working_time), shipped_time = VALUES(shipped_time), receiving_time = VALUES(receiving_time), closed_time = VALUES(closed_time), shipment_status = VALUES(shipment_status), username = VALUES(username), shipment_name = VALUES(shipment_name), msku = VALUES(msku), quantity_shipped = VALUES(quantity_shipped), init_quantity_shipped = VALUES(init_quantity_shipped), quantity_received = VALUES(quantity_received), quantity_shipped_local = VALUES(quantity_shipped_local), declared_diff = VALUES(declared_diff), gmt_modified = VALUES(gmt_modified), ship_to_name = VALUES(ship_to_name), ship_to_country_code = VALUES(ship_to_country_code), ship_to_state = VALUES(ship_to_state), ship_to_city = VALUES(ship_to_city), ship_to_region = VALUES(ship_to_region), ship_to_address_line1 = VALUES(ship_to_address_line1), ship_to_address_line2 = VALUES(ship_to_address_line2), ship_to_postal_code = VALUES(ship_to_postal_code), ship_to_doorplate = VALUES(ship_to_doorplate)
